sentence_text: Quantitative Resilience Modeling for Autonomous Cyber Defense Xavier Cadet1,†, Simona Boboila2,†, Edward Koh1, Peter Chin1, Alina Oprea2 1Dartmouth College 2Northeastern University † Equal contribution Abstract Cyber resilience is the ability of a system to recover from an attack with minimal impact on system operations.

sentence_text: The RealAIGym project focuses on simple, low degree of freedom systems capable of dynamic behaviors, such as a simple pendulum , AcroMonk , RicMonk and the dual purpose double pendulum used in this competition.
